coreFlow: Choose accessible artwork, colour with fill or brush tools, use the preferred accessibility profile, save locally and export the result.

deployment.evidence: repository records all 16 core features and the local verification ladder as passing

knownLimitations: Physical screen-reader, low-vision, motor-assist and mobile testing remains incomplete.
Projects are local-only with no account or cloud synchronization.
The artwork catalogue is intentionally small.

nextMilestone: Package a stable public PWA release after physical accessibility testing across the six supported profiles.
